scope_cn: 只焊 L1 harness 续跑控制流（wave0+wave2）；不扩 phase10/11 新 implementation；不宣布完成
intent_one_liner_cn: 日落 A 前台 180s 保姆：焊 post_worker closeout + auto_continue 去重 + DAG consumed，让 Temporal 编排自持续跑
problem_statement_cn: 外壳已是 Temporal+DAG+exec JSONL，但 worker 收尾后 harness 经常不 enqueue 下一拍，靠 A 前台 correction_note 每 1-2 worker 手补 continue_same_task。这是 Factor-8 控制流未焊实，不是可接受终态。
live_evidence_cn: worker 255/261/267 后 source_kind=correction_note 手补；258→261、264→267 曾自动续
assignment_dag_auto_continue 同 node_id 去重 return {} 导致待自动续跑
snapshot 已有待自动续跑但 harness 未自持接上

external_mature_anchor_cn.factor_8: HumanLayer 12-Factor Agents — orchestrator owns while/control flow; LLM/worker exit is not workflow exit
external_mature_anchor_cn.temporal: Activity 完成默认 schedule 下一 activity；仅命名 wait/signal/timer 可停
external_mature_anchor_cn.continuation_gate: D:\XINAO_CLEAN_RUNTIME\specs\continuation_vs_segment_audit_gate.v1.json — Grok 不得挡主链 partial auto-continue
external_mature_anchor_cn.forbidden_stop: 第四种非法停：worker 终态 + next_ready=true + 无 pending + 无 auto enqueue

must_implement.summary_cn: worker terminal 后 closeout 硬门：无 phase7/completion terminal gate 时禁止 next_ready=false、禁止清空 assignment_dag frontier。worker PASS 必须写 consumed 证据或诚实 ORCHESTRATOR_* blocker。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: 267 类 PASS 后 DAG 节点标 completed_by_worker 或 next_ready 指下一格；不得长期 ready_next 悬挂

must_implement.summary_cn: 修 assignment_dag_auto_continue_signal：同 next_ready_node_id 已派过但节点未 completed 时，不得静默 return {}；应 re-dispatch 或写 ORCHESTRATOR_AUTO_CONTINUE_DEDUP_BLOCKED + partial_continuation_dispatched 真相。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: worker 终态后 ≤30s 内 partial_continuation_dispatched=true 或 Temporal pending=有；连续 3 worker 无需 correction_note 手补

must_implement.summary_cn: signal_continue_same_task_workflow / explicit_phase_worker_assignment_for_task：续跑 signal 必须优先 assignment_dag.next_ready_node_id + 节点 work_package，禁止 stale phase_execution 绑旧 phase8。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: continue_same_task_signal 里 phase_scope 与 assignment_dag.next_ready_node_id 一致

must_implement.summary_cn: rank2 同 workflow auto-continue 不得被 rank3 idle_handoff 覆盖；idle_handoff 仅在 next_ready=false 且非 completion 时。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: next_ready=true 时 idle_handoff_required=false 且 harness 优先 enqueue

must_implement.summary_cn: 强化 observation-snapshot：待自动续跑 必须带 partial_continuation_dispatched/auto_continue_signal_prepared 字段；禁止误导已停/无卡点。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: 待自动续跑 行含 harness 未 enqueue 的可观测原因

must_implement.summary_cn: 落盘 orchestrator_owned_control_flow spec：三种合法停、非法静默停、worker_exit 必留 next_ready 或 blocker、auto_continue 默认、A 180s 仅 rescue 非终态。
must_implement.acceptance_cn: spec sentinel + mirror 双份存在；tests 引用 spec

tests_must_add_or_pass: tests/test_temporal_codex_task_workflow.py — auto_continue after terminal with same next_ready unconsumed
tests/test_ingress_result_recovery.py — continue_same_task binds assignment_dag.next_ready not stale phase_execution
harness_acceptance_cn: 连续 3 个 worker 收尾后无需 source_kind=correction_note 手补
partial_continuation_dispatched=true 或等价 enqueue 证据在 worker 终态后 ≤30s
PASS 后 DAG 节点 consumed；next_ready 推进或 ORCHESTRATOR_* blocker
must_not: idle_handoff 替代 auto-continue 当主链
新开 phase10/11 implementation 为本包主目标
把 A 前台 180s 保姆写成目标架构
Grok segment verdict pass 冒充 harness 修复完成
continuation_gate_note: 续跑门=A+Temporal；Grok 不批主链。段审门不变。本包修 harness 后 A 180s 手补应降为罕见 exception。

semantic_object.north_star_question: 用户说话链上还有手搓在 default 吗 — 本包只答 harness 续跑是否已外部成熟
semantic_object.root_cause: post_worker closeout + auto_continue dedup + missing DAG consumed => illegal wait 待自动续跑
semantic_object.done_means: Temporal workflow self-continues without A foreground babysitting every 1-2 workers

local_snapshot_cn.phase9_implementation: in_progress separately; do not block harness PRs behind more phase9 content work
